name: a clean file yields a green native verdict and exit zero from the shared primitive both callers use
command:
printf '# Title

Hello world.
' > ok.md
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/enforce-write-time.sh" ok.md 2>o.txt; rc=$?
[ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && grep -qE 'status=green rules_checked=[0-9]+ blocking=0' o.txt && echo clean-green-verdict 1>&2
